name: Chicken Almond Bites
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chicken breast meat, cooked and finely diced
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a heavy pan, combine broth and butter, and bring to a boil. Whisk in flour and seasonings. Cook, whisking rapidly until the mixture leaves the sides of the pan and forms a smooth, compact ball. Remove from heat. Add eggs one at a time, beating well until the mixture is shiny. Stir in chicken and almonds. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased baking sheets. Bake for 15 minutes.
